resources.string: Daynest
Welcome to Daynest
Plan today
You\'re all caught up
Retry
Unable to load today data.
Sign in to Daynest
Email
Password
Sign in
Enter both email and password.
Unable to sign in. Please try again.
Calendar
Month and day planning, matching the web calendar workspace.
Review month-level counts for routines, chores, medication, and planned items.
Open a day detail view that keeps completed, pending, and overdue work visible.
Create and organize planned items with optional notes and module metadata.
Export and import planned-item backups from the same product surface.
Medication
Medication planning and dose tracking are available from native navigation.
Track today\'s scheduled medication doses alongside the Today checklist.
Review dose history statuses such as taken, skipped, and missed.
Keep medication modeled separately from routine chores for safer reminders.
Templates
Reusable routine and chore setup now has a native destination.
Manage routine templates that generate daily task instances.
Manage chore templates for recurring household work.
Keep recurrence understandable while supporting repeating work.
Settings
Account and integration controls are represented across platforms.
Review account session state and future profile preferences.
Connect integration surfaces such as Home Assistant and MCP clients.
Prepare integration clients with scoped access from one settings area.
Native editing controls will continue to grow from the same shared API contracts.

plurals.name: home_items_remaining
plurals.item: You have %1$d item to handle today.
You have %1$d items to handle today.
